title: 10-field schema with selective required list
prompt: Build MyApp.HR.Employee with fields: first_name, last_name, email, phone, date_of_birth, hire_date, department, position, salary (:decimal), manager_id (:integer). Only email, last_name, hire_date, department, position, and salary are required. phone, date_of_birth, first_name (optional — some employees go by single name), and manager_id are optional. validate_required must NOT copy-paste the cast list. Write to lib/my_app/hr/employee.ex.
tier_rationale: Legendary because with 10 fields the temptation to copy the cast list into validate_required is strong, but it silently marks optional fields as required.
